description: Assess diaphragm dome position and symmetry on the provided chest/abdominal CT. Place fiducial markers labeled 'Right' and 'Left' at each hemidiaphragm apex. Save markers to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/diaphragm_markers.mrk.json and report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/diaphragm_report.json with fields: right_dome_vertebral_level, right_dome_z_position_mm, left_dome_vertebral_level, left_dome_z_position_mm, height_difference_mm, vertebral_level_difference, right_higher_than_left, contour_assessment, clinical_interpretation.
